risk_title: Implementing Partner Withdrawal Disrupting Component Implementation
risk_summary: A key implementing partner has withdrawn from the component responsible for out-of-school children (OOSC) support, causing delays in back-to-school incentives and learning support activities. This disruption requires project restructuring and may affect vulnerable populations' access to education.
evidence_quote: Activities related to this indicator are delayed due to the withdrawal of an implementing partner under the component. A restructuring of the project is being processed to revise the implementation arrangements under this component.

risk_title: School Construction Delays Due to Contractor Non-Compliance and Site Relocation
risk_summary: Significant delays in school classroom and WASH facilities construction are attributed to challenging terrains, contractor failure to adhere to schedules, and site relocations. These delays affect learning environment improvements and may indicate governance or coordination challenges in project implementation.
evidence_quote: The remaining school classrooms and WASH facilities construction has experienced significant delays towards their completion. The government is urged to undertake actions to ensure adherence to agreed construction schedules by the contractors. Construction of the remaining classrooms has been delayed due to challenging terrains, lack of contractor commitment to schedule, and the relocation of some sites.
